topic: Why do some perfumes last all day?

seo_titles: Can You Master Perfume in One Day?
Why Most Beginners Fail at Perfume Blending
The Fastest Way to Learn Perfume Basics
story_angles: Explain why some perfumes fade quickly while others linger all day.
Compare top notes, base notes, fixatives, projection, and skin chemistry.
Deliver practical takeaways for choosing longer-lasting fragrances.
